titles.romaji: Don't you wish you were here?
titles.english: Don’t you wish you were here?
titles.native: Don't you wish you were here?
titles.tmdb_title: Don't You Wish You Were Here?

description:
The very first film which I tried to show my thoughts. Even just circles may be able to show emotions as a person in animation. The main circle (character) is slightly pinker than the other grey circles (people) and she thought she was very special. But she is very grey in a colourful world. She will find out that grey is not just a boring colour.

(Source: Vimeo)
